scenario.key_phrase: I want to start but not sure about timing

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning! Main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Am I speaking with Ishita?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, yes this is Ishita. Good morning.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! Ishita, thank you for showing interest in PW courses. Main aapko call kiya hai to understand your requirements better. Which class are you currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 11 right now. Actually, I'm looking for some coaching options but not completely sure about everything yet.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing, Ishita! Class 11 is the ideal time to start. Which exam are you preparing for - JEE ya NEET? And from which city are you?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm from Varanasi and preparing for NEET. But I want to start preparation but not sure about the timing... like should I start now or wait a bit?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul right time hai Ishita! NEET ke liye Class 11 se start karna is the best strategy. You have around 13-14 months for NEET 2027, which gives you perfect time for concept building. Have you checked any coaching options before?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I've looked at a few local coaching centers in Varanasi, but they're quite expensive. My friends suggested online coaching might be better. What courses do you have for NEET?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great choice! For NEET 2027, we have NEET Yakeen batch at ₹33,999 with complete 2-year program, live classes, and doubt solving. It's much more affordable than traditional coaching. What's your budget range, if you don't mind sharing?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: The price seems reasonable compared to local coaching here. But I'm a bit confused between different online platforms. What makes PW different? And are there any other course options?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Good question! PW ke teachers like Alakh Sir are known for making concepts crystal clear. We also have scholarship programs and 0% EMI options - just ₹3,299 per month through PW Pay. Are you the one who will be taking the final decision or do you need to discuss with your parents?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I definitely need to discuss with my parents first. They handle all the major decisions regarding my education. Can you tell me if there are any alternatives to the Yakeen batch?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! Family decision is important. We also have foundation courses and you can always upgrade later. Ishita, shall I call you back tomorrow after you discuss with your parents? I can also send you some demo videos to show them PW's teaching quality.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that would be great. Can you call me back tomorrow evening around 7 PM? By then I'll have discussed everything with my parents and can give you a proper answer.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll call you tomorrow at 7 PM. Meanwhile, I'll WhatsApp you some demo videos and course details. All the best for your NEET preparation, Ishita! Any other questions for now?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, I think that covers everything for now. Thank you so much, Priya! I'll be waiting for your call tomorrow and will check the videos you send.
